'''tarama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pock|pock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pock|pock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tarama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæræmæth|tæræmæth]] || [[word:tæræmæj|tæræmæj]] || [[word:tæræmæsh|tæræmæsh]] || [[word:tæræmæ|tæræmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tararamath|tararamath]] || [[word:tararamaj|tararamaj]] || [[word:tararamash|tararamash]] || [[word:tararama|tararama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:taramath|taramath]] || [[word:taramaj|taramaj]] || [[word:taramash|taramash]] || [[word:tarama|tarama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarafmath|tarafmath]] || [[word:tarafmaj|tarafmaj]] || [[word:tarafmash|tarafmash]] || [[word:tarafmaf|tarafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:taramatha|taramatha]] || [[word:taramaja|taramaja]] || [[word:taramasha|taramasha]] || [[word:taramaka|taramaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:taramath|taramath]] || [[word:taramaj|taramaj]] || [[word:taramash|taramash]] || [[word:tarama|tarama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:taramathal|taramathal]] || [[word:taramajal|taramajal]] || [[word:taramashal|taramashal]] || [[word:taramakal|taramakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:taramathatha|taramathatha]] || [[word:taramajaja|taramajaja]] || [[word:taramashasha|taramashasha]] || [[word:taramaka|taramaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:taramathan|taramathan]] || [[word:taramajan|taramajan]] || [[word:taramashan|taramashan]] || [[word:taramakan|taramakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:taramathaoro|taramathaoro]] || [[word:taramajaoro|taramajaoro]] || [[word:taramashaoro|taramashaoro]] || [[word:taramakaoro|taramakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
